headline: Will Skyworks’ AI-Focused Embedded Portfolio Shift Skyworks Solutions' (SWKS) Connectivity Narrative Beyond Handsets?
summary: In early March 2026, Skyworks Solutions unveiled a broad portfolio of new connectivity, isolation, timing, and power technologies at Embedded World 2026, targeting AI-enabled embedded systems across industrial, automotive, energy infrastructure, and mobile devices. The emphasis on ultra-low-latency edge connectivity and precision 5G/6G timing, alongside highly integrated RF front-ends, underlines a push to deepen exposure beyond core mobile handsets into higher-value infrastructure and...
